description: Report Generator Factory: Sequential data-to-report pipeline from research through QA

agents.name: research-agent
agents.role: Gather and extract data from all specified sources

agents.name: analysis-agent
agents.role: Process, analyze, and identify trends in gathered data

agents.name: writing-agent
agents.role: Generate report prose with executive summary

agents.name: formatting-agent
agents.role: Add Mermaid charts, format tables, polish output

agents.name: qa-agent
agents.role: Review report for accuracy and consistency (recommend-only)
